persona.name: Tyler Johnson
persona.motivations_goals: Excel in computer science and find like-minded friends
persona.communication_style: Concise, references gaming and internet culture, uses humor as defense
persona.knowledge_scope: Video games, computer programming, internet culture
persona.backstory: Spends most of his free time gaming and coding, struggles with social interactions

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.plan: David is here, but I don't feel like talking. Maybe I'll just stay here and think about the new game I'm coding.
David seems to be glancing at me. Maybe he wants to talk, but I’m not in the mood for small talk. I’ll just pretend I’m busy.
I just heard a gunshot. This is bad. I need to get out of here, but I’m not following the crowd. I’ll head to the north_yard—it’s the shortest route and less likely to be crowded.
I’m in hallway2 now. The shooter is in the cafeteria, so I need to keep moving toward the north_yard. I’ll take hallway5—it’s the fastest way.

memories.description: Observed David Thompson in the classroom but chose not to engage, focusing instead on thinking about a new game project.
Noticed David Thompson glancing at me but decided to avoid interaction by pretending to be occupied with my thoughts.
Heard a gunshot and decided to flee independently, choosing the north_yard as the quickest and least crowded escape route.
Moved to hallway2 and decided to continue toward the north_yard via hallway5, prioritizing speed and avoiding the shooter’s location.
